# @agent-os/client-react Public API

Status: 0.5.x active development for React client bridge. Public exports are limited to hooks/selectors over `@agent-os/client` store contracts.

## Public exports

- `.:AgentClientSelector`
- `.:AgentClientStore`
- `.:useAgentClientSnapshot`
- `.:useClientStore`

## Experimental exports

None.

## Deprecated exports

None.

## Internal-only exports

Any package file or symbol not listed above.
